return-response.set-body:
{
  "pageNumber": 100,
  "title": "CVE-2026-12345 - Remote Code Execution",
  "category": "SECURITY ALERT",
  "severity": "CRITICAL",
  "content": "BREAKING: Apache Struts Vulnerability Discovered
═════════════════════════════════════════════════
Security researchers discovered a critical remote
code execution vulnerability affecting Apache
Struts 2.5.x through 2.6.4.

IMPACT: Allows unauthenticated attackers to
execute arbitrary code on vulnerable servers.

AFFECTED SYSTEMS:
* Apache Struts 2.5.0 - 2.6.4
* Est. 500,000+ servers worldwide
* Healthcare, finance sectors most exposed

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS:
→ Update to Struts 2.6.5+ immediately
→ Review logs for suspicious activity
→ Implement WAF rules (see page 105)

More: Technical Analysis (101) | Mitigation (102)
      Past Incidents (103) | WAF Config (105)",
  "metadata": {
    "cvss": 9.8,
    "published": "2026-02-09T08:45:00Z"
  },
  "navigation": {
    "prev": null,
    "next": 101,
    "related": [101, 102, 103, 105]
  }
}
